word: G571 - ἄπιστος - ápistos - ap'-is-tos - That believeth not

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: That believeth not
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1 (as a negative particle) and G4103; (actively) disbelieving, that is, without Christian faith (specifically a heathen); (passively) untrustworthy (person), or incredible (thing): - that believeth not, faithless, incredible thing, infidel, unbeliever (-ing).
